name: calendar_list
description: List upcoming events from your Google Calendar. Returns event titles, times, locations, descriptions, and attendees.

max_results.description: Maximum number of events to return (default 10, max 50)

days_ahead.description: Number of days ahead to look for events (default 7, max 90)

calendar_id.description: Calendar ID to list events from (default: 'primary'). Use an email address for shared calendars.
